steps.title: Apply the volume formula for a rectangular prism
steps.content: The volume of a right rectangular prism equals the product of length, width, and height. With $l = 12$ m, $w = 7$ m, and $h = 9$ m: $$V = 12 \times 7 \times 9$$

steps.title: Calculate the result
steps.content: Evaluate the product: $12 \times 7 = 84$, then $84 \times 9 = 756$. The volume is 756 cubic meters.
